new_cascade_issues.title: Loss of optical resolution requirement compliance
new_cascade_issues.description: Removing the telescope tube will eliminate the primary imaging capability, causing non-compliance with GSD ≤ 1.5m at nadir.

new_cascade_issues.title: Thermal control system failure
new_cascade_issues.description: The thermal panel is removed, which will cause the optical bench temperature to exceed allowable ΔT limits across orbital cycles.

new_cascade_issues.title: Structural integrity compromised
new_cascade_issues.description: The removal of the optical subsystem will alter the structural balance and potentially affect mechanical constraints such as natural frequency and vibration response.

new_cascade_issues.title: Star tracker alignment issues
new_cascade_issues.description: Without the optical subsystem, the star tracker's alignment and calibration will be compromised, affecting pointing accuracy.

new_cascade_issues.title: Data processing pipeline invalidation
new_cascade_issues.description: The removal of the optical subsystem will invalidate the data processing pipeline, which relies on image data from the telescope.
